title: Leather Plus
description:
Craft things with leather, steel and much more! Saddles can now be crafted and every tool is changed to needing leather to craft!

This mod will be updated constantly with tons of new features and various mod support.
body:
Hello! and welcome to the alpha version of this mod! 

 

A little about the mod...

Leather Plus adds a slight difficulty to the game by changing all tool recipes to require a new item called leather straps!

It also adds the ability to craft saddles using steel, leather, and leather straps

Leather straps can be crafted in two ways. Using a flint knife, or using a Strap Cutter.

 

[PLANNED] Leather belts

 

[This section will be updated frequently, I am currently adding tons of new items and features as I think of them]

 

Recipes: 
TBA
 

Mod Support:

Curios API

 

 

PLEASE READ BEFORE DOWNLOADING:

(This will be deleted when we enter beta phase)
This Mod is currently in Alpha, it only has a few blocks and items as of current. I will have a set of requirements I am going to meet before I enter beta including stability, game break-ability, usability, etc...
